subcodes.first_line: O My name Mihdi! Upon thee be My glory! Thou didst write regarding the matters raised by Siyyid Asadu'lláh concerning unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی مهدی علیک بهائی صورت مطالب جناب سید اسدالله را نوشته بودید امر اتحاد
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @rejection, opposition and persecution
